name: 假被动炼狱 · 亦真亦假（陷阱套陷阱）
desc: ☠ 炼狱单项突破：假被动 vs 真被动亦真亦假混排，专治“见被动就排除 / 见主动就放心”。初三冲刺·中考拔尖。

m1.m: 不及物 · 永无被动（≠ was happened）
不及物 · 无被动 · 无进行
系动词 · 用主动（sounds / feels…）
物作主语 · 主动表被动（sells well）
延续二十年 → has been dead，非 has died

m4.q: A terrible earthquake ___ in that mountain area early this morning.
m4.why: happen 不及物，永无被动（was/is happened 全错）；this morning 已过 → happened。

m4.q: The opening ceremony ___ in the new stadium next Friday evening.
m4.why: take place（举行）不及物无被动；next Friday 表将来 → will take place。

m4.q: A big fire ___ in the old market last night, but luckily no one got hurt.
m4.why: break out（爆发）不及物无被动；只用 broke 意思变成“弄断”。

m4.q: This umbrella ___ to my deskmate Lily, not to me.
m4.why: belong to 不及物、无被动、无进行；陈述现状用 belongs。

m4.q: The sun ___ in the east every morning, and no one can ever change that.
m4.why: rise（升起）不及物无被动 → rises；raise 是及物（举起/提高），不接这里。

m4.q: This new mystery novel ___ really well; the shop has sold out twice.
m4.why: sell 表“卖得（好）”用中动主动 sells well；is sold / has been sold 是错误被动；sold（一般过去）与下文现在完成 has sold out 的语境不符。

m4.q: I pushed and pushed for ten whole minutes, but no matter how hard I tried, the old rusty gate just ___.
m4.why: 物作主语、特定一次推不动 → 中动 won't open（=拒绝/纹丝不动）；doesn't open 是“习惯性打不开”，与“我使劲推这一回”语境冲突；won't be opened 强调没人去开，与“我使劲推”矛盾。

m4.q: Real silk ___ soft and cool, which is exactly why so many people love it.
m4.why: feel 作系动词“摸起来”用主动 feels，不用被动/进行。

m4.q: Your plan ___ reasonable, though it may be a little hard to carry out.
m4.why: sound 系动词“听起来”用 sounds；不用被动/进行；陈述现在用 sounds。

m4.q: The heavy storm ___ for three whole days and finally caused a flood.
m4.why: last（持续）不及物无被动；过去 → lasted。

m5.q: The Bird's Nest in Beijing ___ for the 2008 Olympic Games.
m5.why: build 及物，鸟巢“被建造”→ 真被动 was built。（故意混进来：别见被动就排除！）

m5.q: Paper ___ by the ancient Chinese more than two thousand years ago.
m5.why: invent 及物，纸“被发明”→ was invented（真被动）；过去时间状语。

m5.q: Look at this messy room! It really needs ___ before the guests arrive.
m5.why: need doing = 主动表被动（= needs to be cleaned）；cleaning 正确；to clean 意为“房间去打扫别处”，错。

m5.q: This traditional fan ___ of bamboo and silk completely by hand.
m5.why: make 及物，扇子“被制作”→ is made of（真被动）。

m5.q: His great-grandfather ___ for nearly twenty years, but the family still tells his stories.
m5.why: die 是瞬间动词不能接“二十年”；延续要用系表 has been dead；has been died 是假被动错。

m5.q: A beautiful double rainbow ___ in the sky just after the rain stopped.
m5.why: appear（出现）不及物无被动；rain stopped 表过去 → appeared。

m5.q: The milk ___ bad because someone left it out of the fridge all day.
m5.why: go（变质）作系动词用主动 went bad；不用被动。is gone 意为“消失/离开”，义不符。

m5.q: These thin rice noodles ___ much faster than thick ones, so keep an eye on the pot.
m5.why: 物作主语表特性，中动主动 cook（cook = 容易煮熟）；“much faster than thick ones”是对两种面条固有属性的比较，排除进行时 are cooking；are cooked 强调“被煮”不合此习语。

m5.q: The prices of fresh vegetables ___ sharply in the past few weeks.
m5.why: rise 不及物无被动；“in the past few weeks”用现在完成 have risen；raise 及物不接此处。

m5.q: What ___ to the little boy by the gate? He looks like he's about to cry.
m5.why: happen 不及物无被动；What 作主语不用助动词，故非 did happen。
